title: README CI status badge + E2E report-artifact note (R2)
acceptance_criteria: A GitHub Actions status badge for the Tests workflow (test.yml) added near the top of README.md, using the correct repo path rahulsunnycs/sentryfront and workflow file name
A short sentence stating the E2E run publishes a 'playwright-report' workflow artifact viewable from the Actions run
No other README content removed or restructured; markdown still valid
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
